provisions.title: Full text
provisions.content:
INVESTMENT SERVICES ACT (SUPERVISORY REVIEW
INVESTMENT FIRMS DIRECTIVE)

[ L.S. 370.47.

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 370.47
REGOLAMENTI DWAR INVESTMENT SERVICES ACT
(SUPERVISORY REVIEW INVESTMENT FIRMS
DIRECTIVE)
11 ta’ Frar 2022
AVVIŻ LEGALI 22 tal-2022, kif emendat bl-Avviżi Legali 74 tal2023 u 157 tal-2025.

Dawn ir-regolamenti ġew pubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
